channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Alien signals may have reached Earth unnoticed
item.description: A new SETI study suggests we may be missing alien signals because their own stars scramble them before they reach Earth.

item.title: Study examines potential cross-species spread of chronic wasting disease
item.description: A new study found that chronic wasting disease can spread silently, with infectious prions present even in symptom-free animals.

item.title: Researchers uncover a vulnerability in forever chemicals
item.description: Intense UV light generates hydrogen radicals that can break down persistent PFAS without additional chemicals.

item.title: Scientists explain bird flocks that seem to defy Newton's third law
item.description: Physicists resolve a long-standing puzzle involving systems like bird flocks and bacterial swarms that appear to violate Newton's third law.
